docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM AS TO DEFENDANT JACOB, WILLIAM M SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-05-2012
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-05-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-05-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST KEN ALAN LAMANCE, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-05-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-25-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-23-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
